headline: Prime Day is almost over, but these are still the best Apple deals I’ve seen

summary: Prime Day concludes today with over 140 fantastic deals. Discover discounts on TVs, smart home tech, headphones, and more. Popular items are selling out, so act fast.

summary: See 24 popular Prime Day deals favored by Verge readers. Discover trusted products identified by community purchases. This is the final chance to grab these reader-favorite discounts.

summary: Find 17 top robot vacuum deals before Prime Day closes. Major retailers like Amazon, Best Buy, and Walmart are offering discounts. This is an excellent opportunity to buy a robot vacuum at a lower price.

summary: The 65" LG Evo C5 4K OLED TV reaches a new lowest price. This top deal is available on Prime Day's final day. Experience premium visuals with this discounted TV.

summary: Discover Prime Day deals focused on beating the summer heat. Explore a personalized shopping guide for cooling products. This is the last chance to grab these summer relief discounts.

summary: Discover enchanting fantasy book nooks to enhance your decor. Add a magical touch to your library or display. These unique items are available with Prime Day deals.

headline: Mahmood announces new refugee sponsorship route into UK
summary: Home Secretary Mahmood introduces a new UK refugee sponsorship route. "Capped safe and legal" pathways aim to restore asylum system confidence. The policy seeks to provide structured immigration options.

headline: Are we in for a summer of serial heatwaves?
summary: Forecasters predict a warmer-than-average summer for the region. There's an increased likelihood of multiple heatwaves occurring. Simon King provides an explanation of this climate outlook.

headline: US strikes Iran after attack on cargo ship
summary: The US launched strikes against Iran following a cargo ship attack. Iran retaliated, targeting American forces, citing a violated deal. Tensions escalate between the two nations after recent actions.

headline: Meloni and Trump: A very public fall-out that is proving very hard to fix
summary: Italian PM Meloni and Trump are in a very public dispute. Their relationship deteriorated from "Trump whisperer" to personal insults. This political fallout is proving difficult to mend.
